name: vibe-build
description: Vibe Build implementation skill pack for taking a product from PRD to working code: roadmap, milestone planning, and task-by-task build.

interface.shortDescription: Build a new app or web product from PRD to working code.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Build bundles a staged implementation workflow that continues from a finished PRD: spec synthesis, frontend-first roadmap, per-milestone planning, and task-by-task building.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me build a new app or web service with the Vibe Build workflow.
